svg.data-topic-id: Project Evaluation: Evaluation of Individual Projects

g.text: Project Evaluation: Evaluation of Individual Projects

text.data-narration: Formative Evaluation: Ongoing evaluation during the project to identify problems and improve the project's quality
This type of evaluation is used to identify problems and improve the project's quality throughout its lifecycle.

g.text: Ongoing evaluation during the project to identify problems and improve the project's quality.

text.data-narration: Summative Evaluation: Evaluation at the end of the project to assess its overall success
This type of evaluation is used to assess the overall success of a project at its completion.

g.text: Evaluation at the end of the project to assess its overall success.

text.data-narration: Cost-Benefit Evaluation Techniques: The process of analyzing the costs and benefits of a project to determine its overall value
This type of evaluation is used to analyze the costs and benefits of a project to determine its overall value.

g.text: The process of analyzing the costs and benefits of a project to determine its overall value.

text.data-narration: Critical Path Method (CPM): A method for analyzing and scheduling project tasks to identify the critical path, which determines the minimum time required to complete the project
This method is used to analyze and schedule project tasks to identify the critical path, which determines the minimum time required to complete the project.

g.text: A method for analyzing and scheduling project tasks to identify the critical path, which determines the minimum time required to complete the project.

text.data-narration: Program Evaluation and Review Technique (PERT): A method for evaluating and reviewing project tasks to identify potential problems and opportunities for improvement
This method is used to evaluate and review project tasks to identify potential problems and opportunities for improvement.

g.text: A method for evaluating and reviewing project tasks to identify potential problems and opportunities for improvement.
